raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting equivalence of outcomes across temporal extremes to promote detachment from duration",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "all durations share a single terminal effect regardless of length",
    "length of existence or process does not alter its ultimate significance",
    "human valuation of longevity is misguided"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a rhetorical equalization but presupposes an unspecified 'effect' without defining its nature, rendering it tautological",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the relevant domain treats final cessation or nullification as the sole valued metric and agents accept indifference to intermediate duration",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "contexts where differential durations produce causally distinct outcomes in achievement, experience, or cumulative impact"
}
